title: Japanese sign targets remain primary under localization
purpose: Keep the text a driver sees on the road intact while adding an English explanation and romaji.

limitations: The sign set is illustrative and is not evidence for a released movement.

then.subject: guidance.destinations_ja
then.rationale: The user must be able to compare the app with the physical Japanese sign.

then.subject: guidance.route_shields
then.rationale: Route shields are the most stable bilingual navigation anchor.

then.subject: guidance.destinations_en
then.rationale: Localization explains the sign without replacing it.
